column1: # GIGANTIC upload_manifest.tsv — genomesDB STEP_3 build_gigantic_genomesDB template
# workflow-RUN_N-build_gigantic_genomesDB, this manifest travels with it and
# describes which terminal files from OUTPUT_pipeline/N-output/ get
# published to the project's data server.
# The surrounding hierarchy (subproject / step / workflow) is INFERRED from
# the manifest's location by the shared helper at
# STEP_3 builds per-species BLASTP databases. The DBs themselves are
# very large; what collaborators want is the summary of what was built,

column6: One row per species: phyloname, source proteome, number of sequences in the BLASTP DB.
Raw BLASTP DB files. Usually NOT published to the server (large; downstream subprojects access via output_to_input/).
